name: code-review
description: Deep code review of a module: analysis, fixes, and verification

parameters.name: test_command
parameters.description: Command to run tests (defaults to 'pnpm run test')

team.name: analyst
team.role: Senior code analyst — identifies issues, patterns, and improvement opportunities

team.name: reviewer
team.role: QA reviewer — verifies changes don't introduce regressions

tasks.title: Analyze {{module}}
tasks.description: Perform a deep {{focus}} review of the {{module}} module. Identify code smells, complexity hotspots, pattern violations, type safety issues, and improvement opportunities. Write findings to analysis-report.md with specific file:line references.

expectations.criteria: The analysis is thorough, covers all key aspects, and provides actionable recommendations with specific file:line references

tasks.title: Apply critical fixes
tasks.description: Based on the analysis report, apply the most critical fixes to {{module}}. Focus on: correctness bugs, type safety issues, and clear anti-patterns. Do NOT refactor for style — only fix real problems.

tasks.title: Verify changes
tasks.description: Review all changes applied to {{module}}. Verify: (1) each fix addresses a real issue from the analysis, (2) no regressions introduced, (3) code quality improved. Write a brief verification summary.

expectations.criteria: The verification confirms all changes are correct, no regressions were introduced, and code quality improved
